zh.lifeSummary: 當Groß Prinz Alexander II. Michailowitsch Von Tver於1301年10月7日出生在俄羅斯特維也特維也時，他的父親Mikhail Yaroslavich Duke Of Vladimir50歲，母親Princess Anna von Kaschin "The Saint"21歲。他於大約1320年與Grand Duchess Anastasia Sofiya Michailovichevna of Galicia在Российская империяТверская結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1339年10月29日在俄羅斯РязанскаяСараи享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Groß Prinz Alexander II. Michailowitsch Von Tver于1301年10月7日出生在俄罗斯特維也特維也时，他的父亲Mikhail Yaroslavich Duke Of Vladimir50岁，母亲Princess Anna von Kaschin "The Saint"21岁。他于大约1320年与Grand Duchess Anastasia Sofiya Michailovichevna of Galicia在Российская империяТверская结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1339年10月29日在俄罗斯РязанскаяСараи享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: Von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Tver
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived by a common pasture, from Middle English tye ‘enclosed piece of land; large area of common pasture’ (see Tye ) + -er.
English: occupational name for a maker of chests, from an unrecorded Middle English teyer, tyer, an agent derivative of the word in 1 above, which also had the sense ‘box, coffer, chest’.

English: occasionally perhaps from the Anglo-Norman French and Middle English personal name Tiard, Tiart with the loss of final -d or -t. It is an Old French form of ancient Germanic Theudhard, Latinized as Thiardus, and is composed of theud ‘people’ + hard- ‘hardy, brave’.

variants.name: Tye
meanings: English (mainly Kent): from Middle English tye, teghe, teye ‘enclosed piece of land; large area of common pasture’ (Old English tēag, tīege). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived on or near such a piece of land, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Teigh (Rutland) or Great, Little, and Marks Tey (Essex).
North German: from a short form, Tide, of the personal name Dietrich .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 鄭, probably representing its Teochew, Hokkien, or Taiwanese pronunciation. See   Zheng   1.

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

nameMeanings.name: II.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Groß Prinz Alexander II. Michailowitsch Von Tver was born on 7 October 1301, in Tver', Tver', Russia, his father, Mikhail Yaroslavich Duke Of Vladimir, was 50 and his mother, Princess Anna von Kaschin "The Saint", was 21. He married Grand Duchess Anastasia Sofiya Michailovichevna of Galicia about 1320, in Tver, Russian Empire. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 29 October 1339, in sarai, Ryazanskaya Oblast', Russia, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Groß Prinz Alexander II. Michailowitsch Von Tver est né le 7 octobre 1301, à Tver', Tver', Russie, son père, Mikhail Yaroslavich Duke Of Vladimir, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Princess Anna von Kaschin "The Saint", avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Grand Duchess Anastasia Sofiya Michailovichevna of Galicia environ 1320, à Tver, Empire russe. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 29 octobre 1339, à sarai, Ryazanskaya Oblast', Russie, à l’âge de 38 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Groß Prinz Alexander II. Michailowitsch Von Tver è nato il il 7 ottobre 1301 nel Tver', Tver', Russia, il suo padre, Mikhail Yaroslavich Duke Of Vladimir, aveva 50 anni e il suo madre, Princess Anna von Kaschin "The Saint", aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Grand Duchess Anastasia Sofiya Michailovichevna of Galicia circa 1320, nel Tver, Russisches Kaiserreich. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 29 ottobre 1339, nel sarai, Ryazanskaya Oblast', Russia, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Groß Prinz Alexander II. ko.lifeSummary: Groß Prinz Alexander II. Michailowitsch Von Tver(이)가 1301년 10월 7일 러시아 트버' 트버'에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Mikhail Yaroslavich Duke Of Vladimir(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Princess Anna von Kaschin "The Saint"(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1320년 Российская империя Тверская에서 Grand Duchess Anastasia Sofiya Michailovichevna of Galicia(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1339년 10월 29일 러시아 Рязанская Сараи에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Groß Prinz Alexander II. Michailowitsch Von Tver nasceu em 7 de outubro de 1301, em Tver', Tver', Rússia, seu pai, Mikhail Yaroslavich Duke Of Vladimir, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Princess Anna von Kaschin "The Saint", tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Grand Duchess Anastasia Sofiya Michailovichevna of Galicia aproximadamente 1320, em Tver, Russisches Kaiserreich. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 29 de outubro de 1339, em sarai, Ryazanskaya Oblast', Rússia, com 38 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Groß Prinz Alexander II. Michailowitsch Von Tver родился 7 октября 1301 г. в местности твир', твир', Россия, его отцу по имени Mikhail Yaroslavich Duke Of Vladimir было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Princess Anna von Kaschin "The Saint", 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Grand Duchess Anastasia Sofiya Michailovichevna of Galicia около 1320 г. в местности Тверская, Российская империя. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 29 октября 1339 г. в местности Сараи, Рязанская, Россия в возрасте 38 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Groß Prinz Alexander II. Michailowitsch Von Tver nació el 7 de octubre de 1301, en Tver', Tver', Rusia, su papá, Mikhail Yaroslavich Duke Of Vladimir, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Princess Anna von Kaschin "The Saint", tenía 21 años. Se casó con Grand Duchess Anastasia Sofiya Michailovichevna of Galicia aproximadamente 1320, en Tver, Russisches Kaiserreich. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 29 de octubre de 1339, en sarai, Ryazanskaya Oblast', Rusia, a la edad de 38 años.
